Global Variable# kDNSServiceErr_NoSuchKey

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceErr_NoSuchKey: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceErr_NoSuchKey#Discussion)

The key does not exist in the TXT record.
